title: Katseye's New Music Video Without Manon
summary: Katseye is a girl group that started in 2023 on a TV show called Dream Academy. They just released a music video for their song Pinky Up, but one member, Manon, is not in it. Manon said she is taking a break to take care of herself, and the group supports her. The video is colorful and has a techno-pop sound. Katseye is getting ready to perform at a big music festival called Coachella in California. Fans are sad that Manon is missing and want her back, but the group says they will keep performing without her for now. The video got over six million views in less than a day, showing many people like it.

background_read: Katseye is a music group formed on a reality TV show. They make pop songs and have fans who watch their videos. Sometimes, members take breaks for personal reasons, which can make fans worry. Music videos help groups share their songs with people online, and festivals like Coachella are big events where many artists perform.
Article_Structure: WHO: Katseye, a girl group, and Manon, a member on break
WHAT: Released a music video without Manon for the song Pinky Up
WHERE: Online on YouTube and at Coachella festival in California
WHY: Manon is taking care of herself, and the group is continuing performances
